summary.zh: 调节预备、跟随与形变幅度，理解物理感对反馈的影响。
summary.en: Tune anticipation, follow-through, and deformation to understand physical feedback.

definition.zh: 动作开始前先向相反方向进行一小段蓄力，用来预示即将发生的运动。
definition.en: A brief preparatory movement establishes direction and energy before the primary action.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 通过反向预备、跟随收敛和适量形变表达动作方向、重量与弹性。
purpose.en: Use opposite-direction anticipation, follow-through settling, and measured deformation to express direction, weight, and flexibility.

frequency.zh: 适合低频、具有物理意味的对象动作；高频 UI 反馈将预备阶段压到极短。
frequency.en: Use for low-frequency object motion with physical meaning, compressing anticipation heavily for frequent UI feedback.

trigger.zh: 由用户主动发起的移动、投掷或状态切换触发，预备方向与主运动相反。
trigger.en: Trigger from user-initiated movement, throwing, or state changes, with anticipation opposite the main travel.

enterExit.zh: 进入先小幅蓄力再完成主运动，结束后用一次衰减跟随动作稳定。
enterExit.en: Wind up briefly before the main travel and settle with one decaying follow-through phase.

interruptibility.zh: 中断时取消剩余阶段并从当前位置与速度转向新目标。
interruptibility.en: Cancel remaining phases on interruption and retarget from current position and velocity.

gestureRules.zh: 手势速度影响主运动，预备阶段不能阻止即时响应；键盘触发使用固定短预备。
gestureRules.en: Let gesture velocity influence main travel without delaying response, using a fixed brief anticipation for keyboard triggers.

reducedMotion.zh: 移除反向蓄力、过冲和形变，直接进入稳定目标或短淡入。
reducedMotion.en: Remove wind-up, overshoot, and deformation, moving directly to the stable target or using a short fade.

reviewNotes.zh: 分别辨析 Anticipation、Follow-through 与 Squash & stretch。
reviewNotes.en: Review Anticipation, Follow-through, and Squash & stretch as distinct concepts.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制形变幅度，保持文字和图标可识别。
reviewNotes.en: Limit deformation so text and icons remain recognizable.
